title: BEIR MS MARCO slice methodology
text: The RAG Benchmark Lab evaluates org-trained ASN embeddings against open SOTA on a fixed BEIR slice. nDCG@10 and Recall@k are recorded per exam tier: basic, intermediate, advanced.

title: GraphRAG exam bridge
text: Multi-hop bridge documents require embeddings with high effective rank. Hybrid BM25+dense plus rerank is the intermediate tier; decomposition and HyDE define advanced tier gates.

title: Rotating eval slice spec 0005
text: Eval slices rotate from production-shaped logs so the conductor cannot overfit a static benchmark. Held-out slices never appear in training pair synthesis for the same iteration.

title: ASN vs InfoNCE on leaderboard
text: Plain InfoNCE is the internal control baseline on the leaderboard. Org models must beat it on effective rank at equal or better nDCG@10 before promotion to applied-test orgs.

title: Silver Lasso lineage
text: YAML benchmark exams from agent-lasso migrate into eval-harness fixtures. Leaderboards remain honest: measured gates, not marketing copy.

title: HyDE query augmentation tier
text: Advanced tier exams apply HyDE-style query augmentation. Collapsed embeddings fail visibly when bridge chunks require diverse retrieval spectra.

title: Matryoshka reporting
text: Report metrics at 64, 128, 256, and full dims. Truncation tolerance is a deploy gate — MRL delta must stay within spec before edge serving.

title: Cost ceiling per exam run
text: Each benchmark iteration respects workspace daily cost ceiling. Over-budget runs pause until Operator resets or next UTC day.
